Class CustomComboBox<T>

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
javafx.scene.control.ComboBoxBase<T>
com.dlsc.gemsfx.CustomComboBox<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CalendarPicker, DurationPicker, TimePicker, YearMonthPicker, YearPicker
public class CustomComboBox<T> extends javafx.scene.control.ComboBoxBase<T>
A base combo-box control that supports configurable placement of the popup trigger button relative to the text field.

CSS Styleable Properties:

CSS Properties
PropertyTypeDescription
-fx-button-displayButtonDisplayDisplay mode of the picker button

    Methods inherited from interface javafx.css.Styleable

    getStyleableNode

  • Property Details

    • buttonDisplay

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay> buttonDisplayProperty
      This property allows customization of the button's display mode within the picker component. Four display modes are supported:

      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.LEFT: Places the button to the left side of the text field.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.RIGHT: Places the button to the right side of the text field, which is the default behavior.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.BUTTON_ONLY: Only the button is visible, and the text field is hidden.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.FIELD_ONLY: Only the text field is visible, and the button is hidden.

      Can be set via CSS using the -fx-button-display property. Valid values are: left, right, button-only, field-only. The default value is right.

      See Also:
      • getButtonDisplay()
      • setButtonDisplay(CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay)
      • buttonDisplayProperty()

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomComboBox

      public CustomComboBox()

  • Method Details

    • buttonDisplayProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay> buttonDisplayProperty()
      This property allows customization of the button's display mode within the picker component. Four display modes are supported:

      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.LEFT: Places the button to the left side of the text field.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.RIGHT: Places the button to the right side of the text field, which is the default behavior.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.BUTTON_ONLY: Only the button is visible, and the text field is hidden.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.FIELD_ONLY: Only the text field is visible, and the button is hidden.

      Can be set via CSS using the -fx-button-display property. Valid values are: left, right, button-only, field-only. The default value is right.

      Returns:
      the button display property of the picker
      See Also:
      • getButtonDisplay()
      • setButtonDisplay(CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay)

    • setButtonDisplay

      public final void setButtonDisplay(CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay value)
      Sets the value of the buttonDisplay property.
      Property description:
      This property allows customization of the button's display mode within the picker component. Four display modes are supported:

      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.LEFT: Places the button to the left side of the text field.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.RIGHT: Places the button to the right side of the text field, which is the default behavior.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.BUTTON_ONLY: Only the button is visible, and the text field is hidden.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.FIELD_ONLY: Only the text field is visible, and the button is hidden.

      Can be set via CSS using the -fx-button-display property. Valid values are: left, right, button-only, field-only. The default value is right.

      Parameters:
      value - the value for the buttonDisplay property
      See Also:
      • getButtonDisplay()
      • buttonDisplayProperty()

    • getButtonDisplay

      public final CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay getButtonDisplay()
      Gets the value of the buttonDisplay property.
      Property description:
      This property allows customization of the button's display mode within the picker component. Four display modes are supported:

      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.LEFT: Places the button to the left side of the text field.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.RIGHT: Places the button to the right side of the text field, which is the default behavior.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.BUTTON_ONLY: Only the button is visible, and the text field is hidden.
      CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay.FIELD_ONLY: Only the text field is visible, and the button is hidden.

      Can be set via CSS using the -fx-button-display property. Valid values are: left, right, button-only, field-only. The default value is right.

      Returns:
      the value of the buttonDisplay property
      See Also:
      • setButtonDisplay(CustomComboBox.ButtonDisplay)
      • buttonDisplayProperty()
